statement: Atropos never mutates state: no fs write/mutation APIs in the runtime; retirement stays a human CHANGE-PROTOCOL act.
File-level anomalies throw; malformed individual entries yield verdict `inconsistent`; nothing is silently skipped.
Never imports clotho/; sole sanctioned cross-package import is merkle-dag/vendor.mjs (canonicalize/sha256hex).
package.json dependencies is empty; Node stdlib + the one sanctioned vendor only.
The verdict is oracled against the real CURRENT-AUTHORITY#superseded data (golden: v11-v14 -> v15 consistent) plus per-defect negatives.
